title: Fix & Fun Day
excerpt: Sunday, May 5 10:00 am – 1:00 pm Join us at Camp Barney for our 4th annual Fix & Fun Day! Camp families and alumni will enjoy lunch and a day of painting, planting, and playing! Leave a lasting imprint on camp with fun, family-friendly activities! Bring the whole family! Free to attend. Afterward, stay […]
contentHtml:
Sunday, May 5
10:00 am – 1:00 pm

Join us at Camp Barney for our 4th annual Fix & Fun Day! Camp families and alumni will enjoy lunch and a day of painting, planting, and playing! Leave a lasting imprint on camp with fun, family-friendly activities!

Bring the whole family! Free to attend.

Afterward, stay and join us for our Spring Open House from 1:00 – 3:30 pm.

RSVP

RSVP required by Friday, April 19.
